MINISTRY OF EXTERNAL AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th June, 2009 , G.S.R. 390(E),-In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 24' and clause (c) sub-section (2) Sectio? 4, Sections 5 and 7, of the Passports Act, 1967 (I 5 ofl 967), the Central Government hereby ?akes the following rules further to amend the Passport Rules, 1980, namely :- · I. (1) (2) These rules may be'called the Passport (Amendment) Rules, 2009. They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Passport Rules, 1980 hereinafter referred to as the said rules, in part II of Schedule II, after serial number 2, following shall be inserted, namely :- "3. Passport for Haj pilgrims (i) Persons holding Haj allotment number for the relevant year from the Haj Committee: Provided that name and allotment number match with the list given by the Haj Committee to the Passport Office", 3. In the said Rules, 1980, in rule 7, after clause (ii), the following shall be inserted, namely:- "(iii)Saudi Arabia". 4. In the said Rules, in Schedule IV, after serial No.6, under sub-heading "Special Travel Document", the following shall be inserted, namely:- "6A. Passport for Haj pilgrims 500 5. In the said Rules, in rule 12, after proviso to sub-rule (6), the following shall be inserted, namely:- "7. The passport for Haj pilgrims shall be valid for a period of eight months from the date of issue". [F. No. VJ/401/1/6/2009] A. MANICKAM, Jt.
